name: Happy Filled Glass 2 Game
description: Happy Filled Glass 2 is an educational leisure online game for boys for free, where you need to draw lines to guide the juice released from the pipe into the glass. On your way, you will encounter various obstacles, try to find a one-time solution and think carefully. The interesting and relaxing theme is perfect for killing time. Complete the task in the level and get a high score!
tags: 3D, Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Drawing, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Obstacle, Online, Pipe, Puzzle
